channel.title: Frequenz
channel.description: A RSS feed containing the latest articles published in Frequenz

item.title: Frontmatter
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2025-frontmatter1-2

item.title: Reconfigurable frequency selective surface based absorber realized using interlocking blocks
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0070

item.title: Dual band beam steering antenna using branch line coupler network for higher band applications
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0078

item.title: High-efficiency quad-band RF energy harvesting system with improved cross-coupled differential-drive rectifier
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0087

item.title: A novel miniaturized microstrip filtering power divider with high selectivity based on composite right/left-handed (CRLH) concept
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0105

item.title: High-selectivity wideband bandpass filter based on quintuple-mode stub-loaded resonator and defected ground structures
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0104

item.title: Design of a high selective triple band integrated reconfigurable filtering antenna for wideband and narrowband applications
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0112

item.title: A novel ultra-wideband end-fire antenna based on spoof surface plasma polaritons
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0120

item.title: Metamaterial-based transmit and receive antennas for wireless image transfer at 5.8 GHz
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0071

item.title: Design of a MIMO implantable antenna with ultra-miniaturized volume and reduced SAR
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0097

item.title: ANN modeling for predicting muscle-implanted antenna performance for skin and fat thickness variations at 2.45 GHz
item.description: Article by Soham Ghosh, Bhaskar Gupta DOI: https://doi.org/10.1515/freq-2024-0081
